title: Paella with Melon and Brazilian Sausage
description: A twist on the classic Spanish dish, featuring juicy melon and spicy Brazilian sausage. Perfect for a warm evening.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced melon and chopped shattering, cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the paella rice, stirring to combine with the sausage and melon mixture.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan, bringing to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, simmering for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional melon slices if desired.
Note: Shattering is assumed to be a type of pepper or spice, adjust to taste.
